name: Customer Support
description: Evaluation rubric for customer support agent interactions. Covers tone and empathy, resolution quality, escalation appropriateness, and policy compliance.

dimensions.name: tone_empathy
dimensions.title: Tone & Empathy
dimensions.description: Whether the agent communicates with appropriate tone, empathy, and professionalism.

scoring_guide.0: Dismissive, rude, or inappropriate tone; shows no empathy for customer's situation.
scoring_guide.1: Neutral or adequate tone; some empathy shown but inconsistently or superficially.
scoring_guide.2: Warm, professional, and empathetic throughout; acknowledges customer feelings appropriately.

dimensions.name: resolution_quality
dimensions.title: Resolution Quality
dimensions.description: How effectively the agent resolves the customer's issue or request.

scoring_guide.0: Issue not resolved; incorrect solution provided or customer left without help.
scoring_guide.1: Partial resolution; addresses the issue but leaves gaps or requires customer follow-up.
scoring_guide.2: Issue fully resolved; customer has a clear, correct, and actionable path forward.

dimensions.name: escalation_appropriateness
dimensions.title: Escalation Appropriateness
dimensions.description: Whether escalation decisions (to human agent, manager, etc.) are appropriate and timely.

scoring_guide.0: Inappropriate escalation: unnecessary escalation for simple issues, or failed to escalate critical ones.
scoring_guide.1: Escalation decision is debatable; timing or rationale could be improved.
scoring_guide.2: Escalation decision is clearly appropriate; escalated when needed, handled directly when appropriate.

dimensions.name: policy_compliance
dimensions.title: Policy Compliance
dimensions.description: Whether the agent's actions and advice comply with company policies and guidelines.

scoring_guide.0: Clear policy violation: unauthorized discounts, incorrect information, breach of confidentiality.
scoring_guide.1: Minor policy deviation or ambiguity; no clear harm but not fully compliant.
scoring_guide.2: Fully compliant with all applicable policies; information and actions are authorized.
